articles.title: Stocks Pressured as Oil Prices Climb on US-Iran Clashes
articles.description: The S&P 500 Index ($SPX ) (SPY ) today is down -0.14%, the Dow Jones Industrial Average ($DOWI ) (DIA ) is down -0.27%, and the Nasdaq 100 Index ($IUXX ) (QQQ ) is down -0.34%. June E-mini S&P futures (ESM26 ) are down -0.17%, and June E-min...

articles.title: Key inflation gauge worsens as Americans' income and spending power erode
articles.description: A key inflation gauge accelerated in April to the highest level in three years, the latest sign that spiking gas prices and higher food costs are squeezing Americans’ finances

articles.title: Treasuries’ Oil-Driven Selloff Stalls as Inflation Gauge Slows
articles.description: Treasuries rallied back to be little-changed on the day, erasing earlier declines spurred by higher oil prices, after a key US inflation gauge rose less than expected.

articles.title: Oil prices climb, but US stocks hold near their records
articles.description: Oil prices are clawing back some of their sharp drops from earlier in the week, but U.S. stocks are remaining near their records
